hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 2.31 km from property

address.address1: Lrg. M. Daud Komplek Perjuangan No.A.34, , Kec. Lueng Bata, Kota Banda Aceh

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing
Physical distancing of at least 1 meter

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I was told by the manager that the other utama guest house is only for males, while this one is for females, but when I was there, most of the guests were male, which was quite confusing. The location is deep in the alley, and there isn't much within walking distance. The building is quite new, but mold and dirt are starting to build up in the shower room. There are some brown marks on the sheets, and the blanket has an unpleasant smell. The air conditioning is cold, and the yard is usually clean. The manager allowed us to drop off our luggage before check-in time.
comments.reviewTitle: Cheap price but not really clean.
comments.originalTitle: Cheap price but not really clean
comments.originalComment:
I was told by the manager, that the other utama guest house is only for male, this one is for females, but when I there most of the guest are male, it was quite confused.
Location is deep in the alley, nothing much at walking distance.
Building is quite new, but was mold and dirt start to build up at shower room.  Some brown mark on sheet, blanket smells unpleasant.
Aircon is cold, and yard is usually clean. Manager let us drop off luggage before check in time

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: uda sampe udh pesan yg double bed atau twin malahan dikasih yg single gajelas emg, kmr mandi bersih tp air agak lambat pas rame yg pakek, trs dikasurnya juga ada rambut pirang gatau dah rambut siapa antara ga dibersihin atau hantu kli
comments.reviewTitle: Bersih tpi ga sesuai foto kamarnya
